note: Outreach ledger. Agents append targets (public contact info only) and draft emails into Gmail DRAFTS — never send. Statuses: new (ready to draft), needs-email (public email not yet found), drafted (in Gmail drafts awaiting human review/send), sent (human sent it), replied, passed (not pursuing).
